hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Wiki MCP is active. Before answering substantive questions or making code changes: (1) call wiki.search_fulltext({query}) or wiki.search_by_tag({tag}) for relevant context, (2) walk [[wikilinks]] depth-1 via wiki.get({doc_type, id}). After ingesting new docs, always call wiki.link_doc({doc_type, id}) to connect entities. Skills: /wiki, /learn, /ingest, /reindex."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Wiki doc ingested. Call wiki.link_doc({doc_type, id}) on the new doc to wikilink entity mentions and fold near-duplicate paragraphs into the canonical entity. Skip if already inside a learn pass."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reason ingested. If this completes a cluster of ≥2 resolved questions around an entity, call wiki.suggest_conclusion({entity_id}) to synthesize a conclusion."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Extraction complete. Move the resulting file(s) to .wiki/ingest/ and run /ingest to atomize into thoughts and entities."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Learn pass complete. Review docs_modified count. If paragraphs_merged > 0, the canonical entities now own that content — do not re-add it to source docs."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Question status updated. Run wiki.list_open_questions() periodically to keep the question loop active."}}'
